*Envive Care Conference Review - V 4.0
Wound Status: Pressure Ulcer to Right hip / Measures 2.5 cm x 2.4 cm / Stage: Stage 3
Drainage present - serosanguineous, moderate. No odor noted. Treatment: Foam dressing change daily.

Pt seen for wound eval. Pressure Ulcer Right hip measures aprx 2.5 x 2.4cm, depth 0.8cm.
Min drainage serosanguineous. Heel wound also eval - R ankle 1.5x1.4, 0.4cm deep, slight serous.
Both wounds cleaned w/ NS, covered. Will follow up Mon.
